emails.subject: Re: Letter re: Information Release
emails.body: Re: Letter re: Information Release Steve, This is a third draft of a letter to Wyden re: information release. The latest draft incorporates comments of Tim Belden and Jim Steffes. Who do you recommend I work with to get this letter finalized? Alan Comnes
